Docs.summary: Represents a packed four-byte identifier used in OpenType font tables and Skia API parameters.

Docs.param: A string of up to four characters. Strings shorter than four characters are right-padded with spaces; strings longer than four characters are truncated.
Docs.summary: Creates an by parsing the first four characters of a string.
Docs.returns: An representing the first four characters of .

Docs.summary: Returns the string representation of the tag as a four-character string.
